title: Head in the Clouds
description: Make it not rain over the cloud level
body:
~ Nice weather is just few height meters away ~
===============================================



Can be used either client-only or client + serverside.

## Client Rendering:
- Makes the environment sunny when above cloud level

## Server Logic:
- All actions that depend on rainy weather will not work above cloud level (getting put out when on fire, using riptide tridents, extra crop ticks, ...)
- Since servers have no idea which height clouds are (this information does not exist on servers) you will have to add this information in the config file

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Agw7MFEL/images/535ba96879c28f1005224823262de6034e825bcb.png)

Due to limitations in the way minecraft renders rain, you will not see rain rendered below the clouds when being above them
